name: OverflowList
visual_summary: OverflowList is a visually customizable list component that automatically hides extra items when there are too many to be shown, typically used when a long list needs to be summarized on smaller screens.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: OverflowList
Description: OverflowList is a visually customizable list component that automatically hides extra items when there are too many to be shown, typically used when a long list needs to be summarized on smaller screens.
Style: e.g. list-item, multi-selectable
Interactions: 
Tags: list, overflow, customizable

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
